'''Ohratuu''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Toria" /> located within the [[Ohratuu system/Legends|Ohratuu system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Piryn Shar sector/Legends|Piryn Shar sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a [[Species/Legends|species]] of docile land-based herd creatures known as [[deripor]]s.<ref name="Toria" />

By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date note">{{JournalCite|10|Toria Tell's Droid Journal (article)}} states that [[Science Research Droid]]s were introduced shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Since [[Reesen Jivrak]] employed a Science Research Droid on Ohratuu, he must have established his base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] at some point no earlier than that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> the former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Reesen Jivrak]] and his small group of followers established a base on the planet. Jivrak employed his modified [[Science Research Droid]], [[Geth]], to synthesize [[Poison/Legends|toxins]] and inject them into the nervous systems of deripors, thereby increasing the creatures' strength and heightening their aggression. The former Rebel general then used the altered deripors in hit-and-run attacks.<ref name="Toria" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ohratuu was first mentioned in "[[Toria Tell's Droid Journal (article)|Toria Tell's Droid Journal]]," an article written by [[Christian Piccolo]] and published in [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]] in [[May]] [[1996]].<ref name="Toria" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ohratuu [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Ohratuu, within grid square K-16.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
